message:
type: CLAIM
files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image.py
summary: Adding backup/backup_suffix params to Image.save() for automatic file backup before overwrite

type: CLAIM
files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image.py
summary: Adding dry_run parameter to Image.save() to process without writing to disk

type: STATUS
files: src/PIL/Image.py
summary: Adding dry_run: pop from **params, use in-memory BytesIO buffer instead of opening real file when True, skip file create/remove/close logic around lines 2561-2590 in save(). Should be additive and not touch your backup/backup_suffix logic if you keep it separate.

type: ANSWER
files: src/PIL/Image.py
summary: Ack - backup logic added right after 'created = not os.path.exists(filename)' at line ~2563, before the append/open-mode branch. Should not conflict with your dry_run buffer changes if you keep them in the open_fp branch structure.

type: STATUS
files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image.py
summary: Done: dry_run implemented via params.pop, uses io.BytesIO() buffer in place of real file open when True, gated file create/close/remove with 'and not dry_run'. Patch written to patch.txt. Tests added: test_save_dry_run, test_save_dry_run_raises_error.
